literal_monolithic_command.reason: Structurally incompatible migration tests require isolated database names, ports, and schema lifecycles.

partitions.name: auth_unit_clean_redis
partitions.command: REDIS_URL=[REDACTED_LOCAL_REDIS_DB] PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=[TEMP] rtk uv run --with-requirements apps/api/requirements.txt --python 3.11 --no-project python -m pytest apps/api/tests/test_auth.py -q --tb=short

partitions.name: rate_limit_unit
partitions.command: PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=[TEMP] rtk uv run --with-requirements apps/api/requirements.txt --python 3.11 --no-project python -m pytest apps/api/tests/test_rate_limit.py -q --tb=short

partitions.name: remaining_unit
partitions.command: PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=[TEMP] rtk uv run --with-requirements apps/api/requirements.txt --python 3.11 --no-project python -m pytest apps/api/tests/ -q --tb=short --ignore=apps/api/tests/integration --ignore=apps/api/tests/test_auth.py --ignore=apps/api/tests/test_rate_limit.py

partitions.name: regular_integration_fresh_db
partitions.command: TEST_DATABASE_URL=[REDACTED_LOCAL_DSN] REDIS_URL=[REDACTED_LOCAL_REDIS_DB] PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=[TEMP] rtk uv run --with-requirements apps/api/requirements.txt --python 3.11 --no-project python -m pytest apps/api/tests/integration/ -q --tb=short --ignore=apps/api/tests/integration/test_durable_processing_schema_db.py --ignore=apps/api/tests/integration/test_quick_share_migration_db.py

partitions.name: quick_share_migration_isolated_db
partitions.command: TEST_DATABASE_URL=[REDACTED_ISOLATED_DSN] PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=[TEMP] rtk uv run --with-requirements apps/api/requirements.txt --python 3.11 --no-project python -m pytest apps/api/tests/integration/test_quick_share_migration_db.py -q --tb=short

partitions.name: durable_processing_migration_exact_isolated_db
partitions.command: TEST_DATABASE_URL=[REDACTED_EXACT_TASK3_DSN] PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=[TEMP] rtk uv run --with-requirements apps/api/requirements.txt --python 3.11 --no-project python -m pytest apps/api/tests/integration/test_durable_processing_schema_db.py -q --tb=short
